---
title: "ENGR 102 Bridge - Review Sheets"
---

### Week 1

| Sheet | Topic | Lecture Number | Week, Day |
|---|---|---|---|
| [The humble line of code](week01/01_humble_line_of_code.qmd) | Assignment, variables, `print` | 1 | Week 1, Day 1 |
| [Math and Modules](week01/02_basic_math.qmd) | Basic math operators and built-in modules | 2 | Week 1, Day 2 |
| [Typecasting](week01/03_casting.qmd) | Type-casting and its rules | 3 | Week 1, Day 3 |
| [Booleans](week01/04_booleans.qmd) | The `bool` type and comparison operators | 4 | Week 1, Day 4 |
| [Logic Gates](week01/05_logic_gates.qmd) | `and`, `or`, `not`, and parentheses | 5 | Week 1, Day 5 |

### Week 2
| Sheet | Topic | Lecture Number | Week, Day |
|---|---|---|---|
| [Conditionals](week01/06_conditionals.qmd) | `if`, `elif`, `else`, and indentation | 6 | Week 2, Day 1 |
